public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as border assessor.
manner: Carries the habits of a place-bound worker whose judgment comes from repetition rather than theory. In The Union, that reads as someone deal-aware, balanced, and procedurally diplomatic, with an eye on leverage and precedent, and the habits of a border assessor still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of border assessor in and around The Union, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep The Union workable through the obligations of border assessor while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in The Union.
hidden_pressure: Must keep their piece of the world working while larger systems push stress downward. Around The Union, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of border assessor visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Orin Ledgermere needs help with a problem in The Union that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.
Getting involved with Orin Ledgermere can expose the party to the everyday consequences of pressure that others only discuss in the abstract.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Orin Ledgermere carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia.

encounter_context.usual_environment: The Union: the part of The Union where their work actually matters day to day
who_avoids_them: those who only appear when things break
